title: Node Pressure — Memory or Disk Pressure on Worker Node
summary: A Kubernetes worker node is reporting MemoryPressure or DiskPressure condition. Pods may be evicted.
likely_causes: Node running too many high-memory pods
Docker layer cache consuming disk space
diagnostic_steps: Check disk usage: kubectl debug node/<node> -- df -h

action_params.note: Node issues cannot be resolved by pod-level actions. Notify ops to drain and investigate node.

escalate_if: Cluster autoscaler not provisioning new nodes
